# opnsense_ddclient_account (Resource)
Manages a Dynamic DNS (DDNS) account on OPNsense. Requires `os-ddclient`.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_ddclient_account" "cloudflare" {
  service   = "cloudflare"
  hostnames = "home.example.com"
  check_ip  = "web_icanhazip"
  username  = "user@example.com"
  password  = "api-token-here"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hostnames` (String) Hostnames to update.
- `service` (String) Dynamic DNS service provider.

### Optional

- `check_ip` (String) IP discovery service used by OPNsense to detect the current address. Defaults to `web_icanhazip`.
- `description` (String) Description of the account.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this account is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for the dynamic DNS service.
- `username` (String) Username for the dynamic DNS service.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the ddclient account in OPNsense.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_ddclient_account.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
